source: PDF source 2024ND148.pdf shows 'first-' at line end followed by newline and 'hand' on next line (line break in hyphenated word), indicating the word should be 'first-hand' without internal space
evidence: DB text at line 58, position 6637: '...affiant have first- hand knowledge.' The source PDF text (lines 129-130) shows the hyphenated word spans a line break: 'first-\n       hand' (correct hyphenation). The DB incorrectly renders this as 'first- hand' with space before 'hand' on the same line. Word count verified: exactly 1 occurrence in DB, 0 occurrences of 'first- hand', and 2 other correct instances of 'first-hand' appear elsewhere in the opinion.
